☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ They were so fucking good at threatening those damn pests for him. Not even just that, but he’s seen them swindle people off the street to people who could level the damn city into bowing at their feet. It’s like their voice is hypnotic and lures everyone into just doing whatever they ask no matter what. Hell, he’s sure they’ve probably managed to do the same thing to him a few times without him noticing, though obviously not to the same degree since he hasn’t realized it.

***

What the fuck? Did he just hear what he think he heard? ❞
